markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content pipeline, process improvements, and performance.](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Staging Process:** To fix manual errors, Relay will now approve content in Google Docs, and GrowthX will own all staging in Contentful. GrowthX is also exploring automated staging.](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** To boost LLM visibility, GrowthX will add 3–5 FAQs to all articles. Relay will investigate adding FAQ schema to blog templates, a low-effort, high-impact tactic.](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [**Holiday Buffer:** To maintain publishing velocity during December shutdowns, Relay will approve more topics now, allowing GrowthX to get one week ahead on content production.](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
  - [**Performance:** Positive signals continue (impressions, avg. position, brand citations). Relay will investigate a GSC "not set" traffic spike to improve attribution.](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)

## Topics

### Staging & Publishing Workflow

  - [**Problem:** The current manual workflow is error-prone and lacks a single source of truth.](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
      - [**Staging:** Content was staged in the wrong Contentful instance.](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
      - [**Handoff:** A manual handoff to a separate publishing ops team creates delays and errors.](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
      - [**Tracking:** Airtable, the source of truth, is updated manually, causing lag between publishing and status updates.](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [**Solution 1: New Manual Process**](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
      - [**Approval:** Relay approves content by commenting in the Google Doc.](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
      - [**Staging:** GrowthX owns updating Airtable and staging in Contentful.](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
      - [**Publishing:** Relay notifies GrowthX via Slack when a batch is live → GrowthX updates Airtable immediately.](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [**Solution 2: Automated Staging (Proposed)**](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [**Concept:** A pipeline step to auto-draft content in Contentful, giving editorial direct control.](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [**Constraint:** Requires IT approval due to strict access policies. GrowthX will investigate feasibility.](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)

### Content Strategy & Quality

  - [**Problem:** High content volume risks topic duplication and keyword cannibalization.](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX will add a vetting step to its pipeline to check proposed topics against published content and keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [**New Tactic: FAQs for LLM Visibility**](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Adding FAQs to articles has shown a consistent lift in LLM traffic without harming human readability.](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
      - [**Action (GrowthX):** Add 3–5 FAQs to the end of all new articles.](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
      - [**Action (Relay):** Investigate adding FAQ schema to blog templates, a low-effort, high-impact technical change.](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)

### Holiday Production & Reporting

  - [**Goal:** Maintain publishing velocity during the December holiday shutdown.](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
  - [**Plan:** Relay will approve more topics now → GrowthX will get one week ahead on content production.](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
  - [**Reporting Snapshot:**](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
      - [**Positive Signals:** Impressions, average position, and brand citations are all rising.](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=1242.0)
      - [**Anomaly:** A large traffic spike to a "not set" landing page in GSC, likely from the podcast. Relay will investigate the GSC configuration to enable proper attribution.](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
      - [Investigate automated staging feasibility with engineering.](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
      - [Add 3–5 FAQs to all new articles.](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
      - [Follow up with publishing ops on moving mis-staged articles.](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
      - [Send async update next week (Thanksgiving).](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)
  - [**Relay:**](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
      - [Approve more topics in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
      - [Investigate adding FAQ schema to blog templates.](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
      - [Investigate the GSC "not set" traffic spike.](https://fathom.video/share/e3Ay43Xgv3sAkvEojSjj1GqnUNpcVw4b?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)
